title: Sterling Config Analysis Findings
description: Validates output from config-analyst. Each finding about pipelines must include the pipeline name; findings about services must include the service name.

fact.description: One config-level claim. Must reference specific pipeline names, service names, or property keys.

source.description: CDT tool that produced this data (e.g. 'sterling-config:get-pipeline').

raw_data.description: Pipeline definitions, service configs, transaction details, event handlers.
